title: Geas Task Self-Check
description: Canonical worker self-check recorded after implementation and before independent review.

completed_work.description: What the worker believes was actually completed in this task.

reviewer_focus.description: Areas reviewers should inspect first based on the worker's own implementation experience. Empty array if none.

known_risks.description: Forward-looking risks, weak spots, or unresolved concerns that remain after implementation. Empty array if none.

deviations_from_plan.description: Differences between implementation-contract planned_actions and what actually happened. Empty array if the plan was followed.

gap_signals.description: Early signals of scope or expectation gaps noticed during implementation. Feeds into closure evidence and mission-level gap. Empty array if none.
